message:
feat(e2e): Add verification module and remote compilation support

Expand the remote compilation helper with verification capabilities
and enhanced end-to-end testing infrastructure:

E2E Verification (rch-common/src/e2e/verification.rs):
- New verification module for compilation result validation
- Hash-based artifact integrity checking
- Cross-platform path normalization for comparison

Remote Compilation (rch-common/src/remote_compilation.rs):
- Remote build orchestration utilities
- SSH-based file transfer optimization
- Build cache management for incremental compilation

Remote Verification (rch-common/src/remote_verification.rs):
- Remote build verification against local reference
- Deterministic build detection
- Artifact diff generation for debugging

Core Updates:
- rch-common/src/lib.rs: Export new modules
- rch-common/src/e2e/mod.rs, harness.rs: E2E infrastructure updates
- rchd/src/config.rs: Configuration enhancements
- rchd/src/main.rs: Integration with new modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
